[Home](https://sift.com)/Partnerships

# Win with the Sift Partner Ecosystem

The Sift Partner ecosystem connects resellers, service providers, and technology vendors with our AI-powered fraud platform. Together, we fight fraud, build trust, and help open new paths for revenue and growth.

[BECOME A PARTNER](https://sift.partner-experience.com/partner/registration)[partner portal login](https://sift.partner-experience.com/login)

![partner-ecosystem-hero](https://sift.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/partner-ecosystem-hero.webp)

## Why Partner with Sift?

The Sift Partner Program helps you unlock new paths to revenue, build customer trust, and fight fraud with the tools and support needed to grow your business.

![shapes](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20539%20350'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

![circle-wavy-check-fill](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

People Support

Get direct access to Partner Managers, Sales Engineers, and Marketing support designed to help you win more deals and grow your practice with Sift.

![circle-wavy-check-fill](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Marketing Tools

Amplify your reach with co-branded collateral, eligibility for joint campaigns, and access to Marketing Development Funds (MDF) that fuel demand generation.

![circle-wavy-check-fill](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Sales Tools

Grow and protect your pipeline and increase profitability with deal registration, SPIFFs, and incumbency incentives.

![circle-wavy-check-fill](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20%20'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Technical Enablement

Build expertise and deliver results with sandbox demo environments, hands-on training, certifications, and technical support when you need it.

## Find Your Partner Level

No matter your expertise—selling, building, or implementing—there’s a way to partner with Sift to fight fraud and fuel growth.

![authorized-resellers](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20802%20499'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

#### Authorized Resellers

Sell Sift products directly to your customers and grow your business with competitive margins, deal protection, and go-to-market support that expands your reach.

APPLY NOW

[

![referral-partners](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20802%20498'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

#### Technology Partners

Integrate with Sift’s AI-powered fraud platform to deliver joint solutions that create seamless digital experiences for customers.

Learn More

](/partners/technology/)

![service-providers](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20802%20499'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

#### Service Providers

Bring your technical expertise to the table by implementing, optimizing, and managing Sift solutions.

APPLY NOW

OUR TRUSTED PARTNERS
